rewards.description: 🎮 Announcing Kakele Online's Epic Twitch Drops!  Embark on a unique journey in Kakele's realm. Dive into mystical lands, conquer quests, and enjoy our exciting Twitch Drops for enhanced gaming. Unlock rewards, including teleports, herbs, potions, and materials.  🕒 Timed Rewards: Enjoy cities Teleports, Ultra potions, Gold Refiner Kits and collect Dog Cards and Trophies.  💰 Prosperity Path: Gain Copper, Tin, Silver, Iron, Gold, Life Herbs, Mana Herbs for success. Accumulate Reputation Coins.  🎈 Grand Finale: End with an exclusive Twitch Drop and Bacon Extravaganza surprise! Link accounts, watch streams, and claim rewards for an unforgettable RPG experience.  🌟 How to Join:  Link Accounts: Connect your account and Twitch in the game app. Watch Streams: Tune in during to your favorite Kakele streamer. Claim Rewards: Receive Twitch Drop notifications claim in the game app.  Influencers: To enable drops on your stream, email us!  Don't miss the chance to enrich your journey with Twitch Drops!
rewards.name: Kakele Online April 2

rewards.description:
Burst Fest Creator Mania is Delta Force's creator showdown — one day, three squads, one championship belt.
Nickmercs, HutchMF, and Cloakzy headline as the Enforcer Squad, facing off against two Delta Force squads in a public lobby score race. Dog Tag hunts, finisher challenges, penalties — and you decide who leads them.
Your vote picks the Enforcer — the one who calls the shots, hands out the penalties, and carries the squad toward that belt. You're not just watching. You're voting. You're rigging the game. You're crowning the champion.
One belt. One day. Zero mercy.
rewards.name: Burst Fest:Creator Mania

rewards.description: To celebrate our 1st Anniversary , we’re bringing you a new exclusive Twitch Drops event! Watch Arena Breakout: Infinite content with enabled Twitch Drops for 4 hours to unlock Twitch Exclusive Skin - Infinite Memory! Please link your Level Infinite Pass account and Twitch Account on the event page https://www.arenabreakoutinfinite.com/twitchdrops , and claim your Drops rewards in time.
rewards.name: ABI Partner-Only Drops

rewards.description: To celebrate the ABI Anniversary Event and in response to popular demand, we are bringing back 9 streamer stickers from the past seasons. Viewers will be rewarded for gifting subscriptions to these eligible streamers in the Arena Breakout: Infinite (ABI) category: ImOw, GL40LabsRaT, HITBOXKING, Arven93, LVNDMARK, QuattroAce, Kritikal, BakedJake, Ralisco. Support your favorite eligible streamers and receive the exclusive Stickers! Note that Viewers who had claimed any of these streamer stickers before S5 cannot re-claim the same stickers this time, and subscriptions will only count toward the event task if gifted while the streamer is live and broadcasting ABI content. Please link your Level Infinite Pass account and Twitch Account on the event page https://www.arenabreakoutinfinite.com/twitchdrops , and claim your Drops rewards in time.
rewards.name: S5 Support ABI Partners

rewards.description: Subscribers with paid and gifted Tier 1 subscriptions will earn the “Date in the Park” icon by subscribing to participating LoL Esports channels. By subscribing, fans will receive an enhanced viewing experience while providing direct support to their favorite leagues and teams.
rewards.name: Split 2 - Sub Drop 2

rewards.description: Earning this reward is simple. You only need to link your IOI Account to your Twitch account and then watch a cumulative 1 hour of HITMAN World of Assassination on Twitch during the drop campaign duration.
rewards.name: Season of the Royal Ace 1

rewards.description: Join our Drops to earn rewards and an exclusive Twitch 67 Emote!
rewards.name: Doomsday Drops

rewards.description:
A new map. A new threat. The ARC Turbine has made landfall and it's unlike anything Raiders have faced before.
Celebrate the release of Riven Tides with our two brand new Twitch Drops, watch any of your favorite creators play ARC Raiders for two hours and claim both the Floppy Disk and the Buoy.
rewards.name: RIVEN TIDES

rewards.description: Earn in-game rewards simply by watching Drop-enabled ESO streams on Twitch!
rewards.name: Night Market

rewards.description: The V3.3 Wuthering Waves Twitch Drops event has commenced!  By streaming Wuthering Waves, you enable your viewers to claim multiple rewards, including the Astrite!  Hasten to broadcast Wuthering Waves, and bestow rewards upon your devoted audience!
rewards.name: V3.3 Wuthering Waves

rewards.description: Watch Quackity's QSMP Season 2 on /quackity, /quackitytoo, or /qsmp for 60 minutes to unlock the QSMP2 emote for a limited time.
rewards.name: Quackity's QSMP S2

rewards.description: This badge was earned for watching QSMP during the initial 2026 launch!
rewards.name: Quackity's QSMP2
